summary: Branch does not implement the spec: templates, helper, and prompt remain in legacy form; acceptance criteria are not met.

requirement_checks.requirement: The default factory review templates are updated to the target structure with bold labels in the summary block.
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md: line 1 contains '✅ Autonomous review completed with decision **PASS**', indicating the legacy banner is still present.

scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md: file contains legacy 'Autonomous review decision: REQUEST_CHANGES (methodology: {{REVIEW_METHOD}})' and trailing artifact/footer tokens, not the target '## Factory Review' header.

requirement_checks.requirement: Both PASS and REQUEST_CHANGES templates use the same visible section headings and ordering.
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md: uses a single-line PASS banner and 'Artifacts: `...`' inline path rather than the shared dashboard block.

scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md: contains multiple sections (Blocking findings, Unmet requirement checks, Full review details) and differs in visible ordering from PASS template.

requirement_checks.requirement: Refactor buildReviewConversationBody to accept parsed review.json and render the new Factory Review summary, and remove the legacy artifacts footer.
evidence:
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: function 'buildReviewConversationBody' (lines ~897) builds a footer string '

—
Artifacts: `review.md`' and appends it to the review body, showing the old behavior.

rg output / git show for the current commit c00f9134b01c27ad3e08fbd96a6822140d2a0174: only '.factory/runs/105/cost-summary.json' and usage-event files were modified in the last commit, indicating the implementation files were not changed in this branch.

requirement_checks.requirement: Review authoring guidance omits manual methodology instruction and clarifies traceability is embedded automatically as a single block.
evidence: .factory/prompts/review.md: still instructs reviewers to 'include the methodology inside review.md' (line referencing methodology instruction).
Acceptance tests in .factory/runs/105/acceptance-tests.md expect the prompt to be revised, but the prompt file is unchanged.

findings.title: Templates not updated to dashboard-first 'Factory Review' layout
findings.details: Both PASS and REQUEST_CHANGES message templates remain in the legacy format and do not render the new '## Factory Review' header, bold summary block, or artifact links as clickable URLs.
findings.recommendation: Apply the template changes described in .factory/runs/105/spec.md: replace both templates with the shared dashboard-first layout and use tokens for decision icon/label, bold summary lines, and artifact links. Update tests to assert the new structure.

findings.title: Conversation body helper still appends legacy artifacts footer and lacks new rendering behavior
findings.details: The existing 'buildReviewConversationBody' function still constructs and appends an artifacts footer and uses truncation logic anchored on the old '## 🧭 Traceability' heading. It does not accept a parsed review.json payload or render the new summary block.
findings.recommendation: Refactor 'buildReviewConversationBody' per the plan: accept parsed 'review.json' alongside 'review.md', render the '## Factory Review' header with clickable artifact links, and remove the legacy footer. Ensure truncation logic anchors on the new traceability summary.

findings.title: Reviewer prompt still instructs manual methodology inclusion
findings.details: The reviewer prompt (.factory/prompts/review.md) continues to instruct authors to include the methodology inside review.md, which will duplicate the method once the new summary block is rendered automatically as specified.
findings.recommendation: Update the reviewer prompt to remove the instruction to restate methodology and to document that traceability is injected automatically as a single '<details>' block.

findings.title: Tests and snapshots need updates to validate new layout
findings.details: Unit CI is green but repository tests and snapshots were not updated to assert the new header, bold summary lines, artifact links, and flattened traceability block. Without updated tests, regressions could go undetected.
findings.recommendation: Add and update tests to assert new PASS and REQUEST_CHANGES comment bodies, including truncation cases. Add a small integration test that provides a 'review.json' payload and validates the rendered top block.
